import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { MagnifyingGlassIcon, MapPinIcon, ChartBarIcon, ShieldCheckIcon, UserGroupIcon, ArrowTrendingUpIcon, Bars3Icon, XMarkIcon, ChevronDownIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline'; const LandingPage = () => { const [isMenuOpen, setIsMenuOpen] = useState(false); const [isScrolled, setIsScrolled] = useState(false); useEffect(() => { const handleScroll = () => { setIsScrolled(window.scrollY > 10); }; window.addEventListener('scroll', handleScroll); return () => window.removeEventListener('scroll', handleScroll); }, []); const navItems = [ { name: 'Features', href: '#features' }, { name: 'How It Works', href: '#how-it-works' }, { name: 'About', href: '#about' }, ]; return (

{/* Bottom Wave */}
{/* Project Overview */}

Transforming Urban Management

Urban Insights leverages cutting-edge machine learning algorithms to analyze community complaints, predict hotspots, and enable proactive resolution of civic issues.

Smart Analytics

Our platform processes thousands of community reports using advanced NLP and clustering algorithms to identify patterns and predict potential issues before they escalate.

  • Real-time complaint processing
  • Geographic hotspot detection
  • Predictive severity analysis

Advanced analytics dashboard for data-driven decisions

{/* Features Section */}

Powerful Features

Everything you need to manage and resolve community issues effectively

Smart Classification

AI-powered categorization of complaints using Natural Language Processing and Naive Bayes algorithms

Hotspot Detection

K-Means clustering identifies geographic areas with high concentration of similar issues

Risk Prediction

Random Forest models predict severity levels to prioritize critical issues

{/* How It Works */}

How It Works

Simple four-step process to transform community feedback into actionable insights

1

Submit Complaint

Citizens report issues through our user-friendly interface

2

AI Processing

ML algorithms analyze and classify the complaint automatically

3

Pattern Detection

System identifies hotspots and predicts potential escalations

4

Resolution

Authorities prioritize and resolve issues based on AI insights

{/* Footer */}

Urban Insights

Transforming communities through AI-powered issue resolution
